final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the presenter.

Style/medium: needs a high-end Chinese domestic GP/LP roadshow deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy and presenter credit
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch theme, Sam Altman as named presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, forward-looking atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances tech innovation with Chinese institutional finance gravitas — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary title), "演讲人：Sam Altman（奥特曼）" (presenter credit), implied roadshow context copy in Chinese
Constraints: must conform to Chinese domestic 路演 / GP fundraising deck conventions — formal layout, institutional tone, no casual or consumer-app styling
Avoid: must avoid overly Western Silicon Valley startup aesthetics; must avoid cluttered or low-credibility slide design
